uplink.description: M-Bus fixed-data water frame (upstream example): actual 1 l, fixed-date 135 l
uplink._note: Upstream oracle decodes data[] = [{storage0, 1 l},{storage1, 135 l}]; actual (storage 0) -> metering.water.total, stored -> volumeStored. status 0 -> no warnings.

uplink.description: Synthetic litres frame with Power Low status flag (123456 l actual, 99 l stored)
uplink._note: Built as a valid CI=0x73 fixed water frame; upstream oracle yields data[]=[{123456 l},{99 l}] and pushes 'Power Low' to its application-status list (status byte 0x04). We surface that as a warning.

uplink.description: Synthetic cubic-metre frame (5 m3 actual -> 5000 L, 0 m3 stored)
uplink._note: Unit nibble selects m3 (volume idx 14, exp 0); upstream oracle decodes 5 m3 / 0 m3. metering.water.total is litres so 5 m3 -> 5000 L (AUTHORING unit table x1000).
Upstream rejects any frame header other than (1,1); our codec returns an error rather than a partial total.
